title: acoridium curranii
intro: Acoridium curranii, also known as the " Philippine Acacia", is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is a tree that grows up to 15 meters tall and has a broad and flat crown, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Acoridium curranii include the treatment of fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Herbal preparations of Acoridium curranii include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the leaves and branches in water, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues.
